description:
## File
src/quickheadlines.cr line ~138

## Problem
Missing Origin header is allowed when APP_ENV=development. If production is accidentally set to development mode (or APP_ENV unset), CSRF protection on WebSockets is disabled with no warning in logs.

## Fix
Always require the Origin header. In development, log a warning but still validate. Or use a separate explicit flag rather than tying to APP_ENV.
title: Fix: WebSocket allows no-Origin in development mode
